From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Cassiar (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=Cassiar_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "Cassiar (disambiguation)"))

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[cassiar](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Special:Search/cassiar "wiktionary:Special:Search/cassiar")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**Cassiar** may refer to:

* [Cassiar, British Columbia](/wiki/Cassiar,_British_Columbia "Cassiar, British Columbia"), a ghost town in northern British Columbia
* [Stewart-Cassiar Highway](/wiki/Stewart-Cassiar_Highway "Stewart-Cassiar Highway"), the northwesternmost highway in British Columbia
* [Cassiar Mountains](/wiki/Cassiar_Mountains "Cassiar Mountains"), in northern British Columbia and southern Yukon
* [Cassiar Land District](/wiki/Cassiar_Land_District "Cassiar Land District"), a cadastral survey division of British Columbia
* [Cassiar River](/wiki/Cassiar_River "Cassiar River"), a tributary of the Turnagain River
* [Cassiar Tunnel](/wiki/Cassiar_Tunnel "Cassiar Tunnel") (sometimes called the Cassiar Connector), a highway traffic tunnel on the Trans-Canada Highway in Vancouver, British Columbia
* [Cassiar (electoral district)](/wiki/Cassiar_(electoral_district) "Cassiar (electoral district)"), a former provincial electoral district in northern British Columbia
* [Cassiar Gold Rush](/wiki/Cassiar_Gold_Rush "Cassiar Gold Rush") (1873), a gold rush in British Columbia
* [Cassiar Country](/wiki/Cassiar_Country "Cassiar Country"), a historical region in British Columbia
